objective: Enable or explicitly disposition seek-and-ponder memory-integrity participation in the hldpro-governance registry after downstream seek-and-ponder#23 completed required-check and memory bootstrap adoption.
scope_boundary: Update planning, execution-scope, registry, validation, closeout, and generated governance evidence surfaces for issue #331.
Do not edit downstream product repositories.
Use the existing external Claude memory bootstrap as validation input.
out_of_scope: New required-check or ruleset work in downstream repos.
Changing memory_integrity.py semantics unless validation exposes a blocker.
Cleaning unrelated dirty files in the shared hldpro-governance checkout.
research_summary: The current registry already contains seek-and-ponder with graphify, sweep, metrics, raw feed, Codex ingestion, compendium, and code governance enabled, but memory_integrity remains false with rationale pointing to seek-and-ponder#23. Downstream issue #23 is now closed, with a local external memory bootstrap verified at ~/.claude/projects/-Users-bennibarger-Developer-HLDPRO-seek-and-ponder/memory/. scripts/overlord/memory_integrity.py already derives its repo list from the registry flag, so implementation should be a registry disposition plus validation and closeout evidence.

sprints.name: Planning And Scope
sprints.goal: Commit the issue-backed planning bundle before implementation edits.
tasks: Create PDCAR and structured plan artifacts.
Create planning and implementation execution scopes.
Create same-family exception for no-HITL implementation by Codex.
Add #331 to governance progress and backlog mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: Planning artifacts validate as JSON where applicable.
Planning execution scope passes against the planning diff.
#331 appears in active governance mirrors before implementation begins.

sprints.name: Registry Enablement
sprints.goal: Make seek-and-ponder memory-integrity participation explicit and validator-backed.
tasks: Update seek-and-ponder registry rationale and issue refs.
Enable memory_integrity if validation of the external memory bootstrap passes.
Run registry, memory, graphify, compendium, progress, backlog, and closeout validations.
Record final validation and closeout evidence.
acceptance_criteria: seek-and-ponder memory_integrity disposition is explicit in docs/governed_repos.json.
memory_integrity.py validates seek-and-ponder successfully or documents an issue-backed deferral.
Final e2e gate passes before #331 is closed.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify exact files, validators, and derived surfaces for seek-and-ponder memory-integrity enablement.
specialist_reviews.summary: Hubble confirmed the implementation should primarily edit docs/governed_repos.json because memory_integrity.py already honors the registry flag. It also identified validation commands and secondary generated surfaces to watch.

alternate_model_review.summary: Alternate-family review should be attempted for the implementation PR if Claude CLI is available. If unavailable, deterministic validators plus the same-family exception govern this small registry-only slice.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: After the planning PR lands, Codex may update the seek-and-ponder registry disposition, generated compendium/graph/wiki evidence if validators require it, validation artifacts, closeout, and progress/backlog mirrors for #331 only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Open and merge planning PR, then perform the scoped registry implementation and run the final e2e gate.

material_deviation_rules: If memory bootstrap validation fails, repair or create a downstream issue before closing #331.
If implementation requires script or workflow changes, create a new issue or scope expansion before editing those files.
If graphify or compendium generation changes broad unrelated surfaces, inspect and include only generated outputs tied to the registry flip.
If live GitHub inventory disagrees with the registry, stop and route through the org inventory drift issue path.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules and loop through PDCAR, GH epic, ACs, e2e testing as final AC, no HITL
